titleStmt.title: SII 15.171: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 171. (B.K. No. 65 of 1929-30.) TĀḶIKŌṬI, MUDDEBIHAḶ TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Rāmasvāmi temple.
This is dated the 26th regnal year of the king, Pārthiva, Āshāḍha, śu. 5, Monday corresponding to 1225 A.D., June 12. The weekday, however, was Thursday.

It records a gift of land to the god Svyambhu Sōmanātha of Tāḷiyakōṭe by Mahāmaṇḍalika Magaramurāri Jayitapāḷanāyaka and Māṇikādēvi. The gift seems to have been made in the course of an expedition in the Hagaraṭṭage-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyana
garāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti
samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja yādavanārāyaṇa vaṁsōbhava kuṇa(ḷa)tiḷaka
ballaha siṁghaṇadēvavijayarājya 26 neya pārththiva
saṁvacharada Āśāḍha sudha paṁchami sōmavāradaṁ
du śrīmanu mahāpradhānaṁ śrīmadupparavaṭṭada
dhipati yaribirudamaṁḍaṇi(ḷi)kamakagrāha
hoyiśaṇadiśāpaṭṭa yādavarājyasamudharaṇa
kaṁdhāreya kōḷāhaḷa yativisamagaja
hayāruḍha prauḍharēkhārēvaṁta jayāṁganākā
ṁta baladahuṁkaṇiya toḍacuva nāyakara gaṁḍa śrī
manu mahāmaṁḍaṇi(ḷi)ka magaramurāri jayita
pāḷadēvanāyakaru māṇikādēviyaruṁ haga
raṭṭagenāḍa huḍisabaṁdali tāḷiyakōṭe
ya śrī śvayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvara Aṁ
gabhōga raṁgabhōga pātrapāUḷa chai
tra paiyitrake sarvvanamasyavā 32 gēṇa
kōlalu biṭṭa mattaru 40 maṁ yī dhaṁ
rmmavaṁ pālisidātaṁge vāraṇāsi
yalu sahasra kavileyaṁ dānaṁ māḍida
phalaṁ sārggu yidanaḷidātaṁge saha
sra kavileyanaḷida dōsaṁ sārggu .
Digital edition of SII 15.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
